summary: Iter12 fully verified. All 4 review-request items pass. Backend bug-fix confirmed: inbound WhatsApp webhook now persists `from` (customer phone) and `to_phone` (display_phone_number) on each msg_doc, and per-phone filter now surfaces inbound messages (>=2 instead of 0). Frontend /leads-originated WA-icon redirects use `/chat?lead={id}` only — no `phone=` parameter, no banner. Direct deep-link `/chat?lead=X&phone=Y` still respects the filter (back-compat). /chat no longer mutates lead.active_wa_phone on visit.

ui_bugs.issue: React DOM nesting hydration warning: <button data-testid='leads-card-wa-...'> is nested inside the parent <button data-testid='lead-card-...'>. Browser logs 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'. Functionally works (e.stopPropagation prevents double trigger) but produces console errors. Same pattern in desktop row (leads-row-wa-* inside lead-row-* tr — that one is fine since tr is not a button).

action_items: (LOW) Refactor Leads.jsx mobile card so the WA-icon button is not nested inside the parent <button>. Make the parent a clickable <div role='button'> or move the WA action outside the card click target.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend webhook `msg_doc` correctly persists both `from` and `to_phone` (server.py L4891-4892). Inbound media branch and quoted-reply branch preserve these fields.
Chat.jsx no longer issues an auto-PUT to /api/leads/{id}/active-wa-phone on initialPhone deep-link (verified by grep). phoneFilter state still drives ?phone= on /messages.
LeadDrawer's open-full-chat-btn and PhonesRow's open-whatsapp-{phone} both use /chat?lead=${id} only (no phone). leads-row-wa-* and leads-card-wa-* in Leads.jsx ditto.
phone_match_pattern + $or:[to_phone, from] correctly handles last-10-digit suffix matching (test_phone_invalid_no_500 confirms no 500 on garbage input).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration11_wa_phone_filter.py (replaced legacy test_phone_b_returns_only_b which documented the bug; new test_phone_b_returns_only_b_inbound_fixed asserts >=2 inbound messages match phone_b filter; added test_inbound_msg_has_from_and_to_phone)
/app/backend/tests/test_iteration12_chat_no_mutation.py (NEW — webhook persists from+to_phone, phone filter returns inbound, active_wa_phone not mutated by GET /messages?phone=)
test_credentials: admin/Admin@123 (used). ravi/Exec@123 and priya/Exec@123 not exercised — admin coverage was sufficient for this iteration's scope.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter12_* lead with 1 inbound webhook msg. test_iteration11 module also creates TEST_iter11_* leads with 4 inbound msgs across 2 phones. Cleanup not performed (TEST_ prefix preserved for traceability).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter12 complete. Test files ready for regression: test_iteration11_wa_phone_filter.py (10 tests) + test_iteration12_chat_no_mutation.py (4 tests). Run with `export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://crm-lead-mgmt-3.preview.emergentagent.com && pytest backend/tests/test_iteration11_wa_phone_filter.py backend/tests/test_iteration12_chat_no_mutation.py -v`. The only carryover issue is the cosmetic <button>-in-<button> hydration warning in Leads.jsx mobile cards.
